General.Name: Tiptree Inc
General.Description: Tiptree Inc. does not have significant operations. Previously, it was engaged in the provision of specialty insurance products. The company was formerly known as Tiptree Financial Inc. and changed its name to Tiptree Inc. in December 2016. Tiptree Inc. was incorporated in 2007 and is based in Greenwich, Connecticut.
